title: Dro family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Dro family''' were an [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] family. They, along with the [[House of Thul|Thul family]], practiced the [[Ceremony of Waters]]. One member of the Dro family was [[Aryn Dro Thul]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]''
